evidence: Iterate-2 fix (scripts/promote-cli.mjs, commit 57d331d) verified by runtime demonstration against throwaway /tmp, poisoned-env, and symlink prefixes, plus a fresh independent adversarial probe. The real-global (O1-O7) and docs (D1-D2) criteria were not exercised — the real-global promote is paused pending these residuals. Two findings beyond S1-S4: a glued --prefix=<dir> is not recognized by argv.indexOf('--prefix') (line ~133) and falls through to the real-global arm, silently targeting /opt/homebrew; and the post-install verify guard (~line 292) uses literal REPO_ROOT with startsWith and no +sep guard, inconsistent with the validation's REPO_ROOT_REAL + sep.

criteria_results.criterion: realpath of /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context resolves under /opt/homebrew/lib/node_modules/@davidorex/pi-context-cli/, not under /Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension.
criteria_results.evidence: real-global promote paused; analog observed on throwaway (/tmp/s2target/bin/pi-context -> ../lib/node_modules/...), not on /opt/homebrew.

criteria_results.criterion: npm ls -g --link lists no @davidorex/pi-context-cli link to the repo.
The installed operator reflects working-tree code, not the registry 0.31.0 release.
A repo npm run build leaves the realpath target of /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context unchanged in inode and content hash.
After a repo npm run build, pi-context --version exits 0.
A re-promote after a repo source edit changes the content hash of the realpath target of /opt/homebrew/bin/pi-context.
No file under the repo instructs npm link for the operator binary.
criteria_results.evidence: docs audit not run this iterate.

criteria_results.criterion: packages/pi-context-cli/README.md and the root README.md document the copy install of the operator.
criteria_results.evidence: docs audit not run this iterate.

criteria_results.criterion: An inherited global-prefix override, with no --prefix or PROMOTE_PREFIX given, is refused — no global install or removal occurs.
criteria_results.evidence: npm_config_prefix=/tmp/x, NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=/tmp/x, and Npm_Config_Prefix=/tmp/x each exited non-zero before any global op, naming the matched key (case-insensitive scan, resolveTargetPrefix ~line 146).

criteria_results.criterion: Every global install or removal the promote performs acts only on the validated target prefix.
criteria_results.evidence: TOCTOU: assertSafeTargetPrefix validates the nearest-existing-ancestor realpath (~line 233) but the install passes the literal unresolved prefix to npm --prefix (~line 274); a path-component symlink repointed during the build/pack window redirects the install to a target validation never approved. The decoy-env case (NPM_CONFIG_PREFIX=/tmp/decoy + --prefix /tmp/s2target) did install only into /tmp/s2target with /tmp/decoy never created, but the invariant is not held under the race.

criteria_results.criterion: A target prefix whose realpath resolves to or under the repo root is refused — no global install or removal occurs.
criteria_results.evidence: --prefix /Users/david/Projects/workflowsPiExtension/packages refused ('resolves under this repo's root'); --prefix /tmp/sym-into-repo (symlink -> repo packages) refused on its resolved path; both before any build/pack/install.

criteria_results.criterion: A failed global install leaves the prior operator runnable and its installed payload unchanged.
criteria_results.evidence: no npm rm -g remains (grep of full promote output = 0); a forced install over a seeded npm-link cleanly replaced it; a failed npm i -g (bogus tarball) left the prior install intact (probe-reproduced).
